blocks.text: From Internazionale to the Emirates: Norway's week just gets bigger
Bodø/Glimt's stunning 1-2 win at Internazionale on Tuesday left Norwegian football euphoric. Now Arsenal lead the Premier League by five points ahead of Sunday's crunch derby against Chelsea.
🎮 16:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) battles ESL Pro League Season 23, Stage 1 online
🏅 20:00 — Paralympic Winter Games 2026 Opening Ceremony, Milano-Cortina
